1x1.description: The cable connects the right and bottom edges, forming an elbow shape.

1x2.description: The cable shape connects to the top, bottom, and right sides.

1x3.description: The cable connects the top and bottom edges.

2x1.description: The cable connects the left and right edges.

2x2.description: The cable connects to the left, right, and bottom edges.

2x3.description: The cable connects to the left, right, and bottom edges.

3x1.description: The cable reaches the top, left, and bottom edges.

3x2.description: The cable connects to the top and left edges.

3x3.description: The cable connects to the top and right sides (L shaped).
